Splat Bomb.description: Throwable. A bomb that rolls or bounces and explodes after about one second. Great for flushing out enemies, getting revenge splats, and stalling pursuers.

Suction Bomb.description: Throwable. Longer fuse time than Splat Bomb and sticks to walls. Excellent for lethal traps, area denial and objective control.

Burst Bomb.description: Throwable. A paint balloon that explodes on contact, painting the surface it hits and dealing minor damage to opponents.

Curling Bomb.description: An explosive that travels along the ground, leaving a trail of ink. Once it travels its maximum distance, it has a deadly explosion.

Autobomb.description: Throwable. Detects any opponents within its radius and follows them around until it explodes. Great for flushing out sharking opponents.

Ink Mine.description: A hidden trap that deals chip damage, paints turf, and tracks enemies who step on it. Good for defending flanks and preventing pushes.

Toxic Mist.description: Throwable. A small cloud of ink mist that slows down opponents and drains their ink tank. Used to slow down or prevent opponents from moving through an area.

Point Sensor.description: Throwable. Labels the position of any opponent that is hit by it or moves into its radius. Forces opponents to play more cautiously, since their movements are known.

Splash Wall.description: A temporary wall. Blocks opponent shots and bombs explode on contact. Opponents take damage when touching it. Used to take up space, block routes, or protect retreats.

Sprinkler.description: A sprinkler that passively paints a circle of turf around it. A set-and-forget method of painting, and a distraction to opponents. Crucial aid in holding a Splat Zone.

Squid Beakon.description: A beacon that allows up to two players to jump to it before breaking. Opponents within range are labeled on the map. Used to get teams in fast. Also a distraction: opponents will often prioritize removing them.

Fizzy Bomb.description: Throwable. A bomb that requires shaking to activate. When thrown, it paints a long trail of ink that ends in three small explosions that are deadly in combination. Useful for poking and chipping.

Torpedo.description: Throwable. A bomb that detects nearby players and follows them. Explodes on impact and creates a second radius of smaller explosions. Opponents can shoot it down, but it's a hassle to do. Relatively cheap.

Angle Shooter.description: Throwable. A dart that travels far and fast in a straight line. Does damage on impact and labels opponents position. Opponents that move into its trail are also labeled.
